headline: Centurion Appoints Dr. Dennis LaPoint as President and Director
summary: Vancouver, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - April 1, 2026) - CENTURION MINERALS LTD. (TSXV: CTN) ("Centurion" or the "Company") is pleased to announce that Dr. Dennis LaPoint, Ph.D., P.Geo has been appointed as President and a member of the Company's Board of Directors.Dr. LaPoint brings over 26 years of experience working in Suriname, where he led a geological team that was responsible for the discovery of the Merian Mine, now owned and operated by Newmont Corporation. Additionally, as...
